# Example Site

> A WordPress site run by Jane Dev, a software developer. The site sells products
> through WooCommerce and publishes articles about web development.

This site is WP_Discovery compliant. A machine-readable Discovery Document is
available at https://example.com/.well-known/discovery.json — start there to learn
what this site exposes and how to interact with it.

## Discovery

- [Discovery Document](https://example.com/.well-known/discovery.json): Normalized capabilities, APIs, and agents.
- [Agent Card](https://example.com/.well-known/agent-card.json): A2A-style agent descriptors.
- [Sitemap](https://example.com/wp-sitemap.xml): All public URLs.

## Commerce

- [Store API](https://example.com/wp-json/wc/store/v1): Public WooCommerce Store API — browse products and operate the cart/checkout (no auth).
- [Store-management API](https://example.com/wp-json/wc/v3): Authenticated WooCommerce admin API (requires REST API keys).
- [WooCommerce REST docs](https://woocommerce.github.io/woocommerce-rest-api-docs/): Reference for both APIs.

## About

- [About Jane Dev](https://example.com/): Software developer; site owner and primary author.

## Contact

- Email: mailto:jane@example.com

## Policies

- [Privacy policy](https://example.com/privacy-policy/)
- [security.txt](https://example.com/.well-known/security.txt)
